name: Golf TCR
about: TCR (The Club of Riverdale) is a multi-sport athletic and social club established in 1993, located in the scenic Riverdale neighborhood of New York City. The facility offers a comprehensive range of amenities including a fitness center, indoor tennis courts, a year-round swimming pool, yoga studios, and golf simulators. TCR provides a welcoming community environment dedicated to wellness, growth, and lifelong connection, with offerings for all ages including fitness memberships, afterschool programs, summer and holiday camps, and private or group lessons. The golf facilities are part of a larger family-oriented athletic club that emphasizes both individual improvement and community engagement.
why_golfers_like_it: Indoor golf simulator access within a full-service athletic club
Part of a comprehensive fitness and sports facility with multiple amenities
Available golf programs include private lessons, junior golf, and golf camps
Year-round access regardless of weather conditions
Part of a family-friendly community environment

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify whether clubs are provided or if golfers need to bring their own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website doesn't have a clear policy on outside food and drinks, though it mentions a cafe facility.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify the typical duration for playing 18 holes on their simulators.

faq.question: Is TCR kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, TCR is explicitly described as a family-friendly athletic club with dedicated junior programs, camps, and kids' activities.
